mapper.select: select (select ifnull(sum(amount),0) from fin_receipt where receipt_date between #{startDate} and #{endDate}) as income_amount, ((select ifnull(sum(amount),0) from fin_payment where payment_date between #{startDate} and #{endDate}) + (select ifnull(sum(amount),0) from fin_expense where expense_date between #{startDate} and #{endDate})) as cost_amount, ((select ifnull(sum(amount),0) from fin_receipt where receipt_date between #{startDate} and #{endDate}) - ((select ifnull(sum(amount),0) from fin_payment where payment_date between #{startDate} and #{endDate}) + (select ifnull(sum(amount),0) from fin_expense where expense_date between #{startDate} and #{endDate}))) as profit_amount

select (select ifnull(sum(amount),0) from fin_receipt where receipt_date between #{startDate} and #{endDate}) as income_amount, ((select ifnull(sum(amount),0) from fin_payment where payment_date between #{startDate} and #{endDate}) + (select ifnull(sum(amount),0) from fin_expense where expense_date between #{startDate} and #{endDate})) as expense_amount, ((select ifnull(sum(amount),0) from fin_receipt where receipt_date between #{startDate} and #{endDate}) - ((select ifnull(sum(amount),0) from fin_payment where payment_date between #{startDate} and #{endDate}) + (select ifnull(sum(amount),0) from fin_expense where expense_date between #{startDate} and #{endDate}))) as net_amount

select '采购付款' as cost_type, ifnull(sum(amount),0) as cost_amount from fin_payment where payment_date between #{startDate} and #{endDate} union all select concat('费用-', expense_type) as cost_type, ifnull(sum(amount),0) as cost_amount from fin_expense where expense_date between #{startDate} and #{endDate} group by expense_type

select p.product_id as productId, p.product_code as productCode, p.product_name as productName, ifnull(sum(i.quantity), 0) as saleQty, ifnull(sum(i.amount), 0) as saleAmount, ifnull(sum(i.quantity * ifnull(p.cost_price, 0)), 0) as costAmount, ifnull(sum(i.amount - i.quantity * ifnull(p.cost_price, 0)), 0) as grossProfit from sal_order o inner join sal_order_item i on o.order_id = i.order_id left join md_product p on i.product_id = p.product_id where o.order_type = 'sale' and o.business_date between #{startDate} and #{endDate} group by p.product_id, p.product_code, p.product_name order by grossProfit desc

select c.customer_id as customerId, c.customer_code as customerCode, c.customer_name as customerName, ifnull(sum(o.total_amount), 0) as saleAmount, count(o.order_id) as orderCount, ifnull(sum(o.total_amount), 0) - ifnull(sum(r.unpaid_amount), 0) as receivedContribution, ifnull(sum(r.unpaid_amount), 0) as unpaidAmount from sal_order o left join md_customer c on o.customer_id = c.customer_id left join ( select source_bill_id, sum(amount - received_amount) as unpaid_amount from fin_receivable where source_bill_type = 'sale_order' group by source_bill_id ) r on r.source_bill_id = o.order_id where o.order_type = 'sale' and o.business_date between #{startDate} and #{endDate} group by c.customer_id, c.customer_code, c.customer_name order by saleAmount desc

select p.product_id as productId, p.product_code as productCode, p.product_name as productName, ifnull(l.outbound_qty, 0) as outboundQty, ifnull(l.inbound_qty, 0) as inboundQty, ifnull(s.stock_qty, 0) as stockQty, case when ifnull(s.stock_qty, 0) = 0 then 0 else round(ifnull(l.outbound_qty, 0) / ifnull(s.stock_qty, 0), 4) end as turnoverRate from md_product p left join ( select product_id, sum(case when in_out = 'out' then quantity else 0 end) as outbound_qty, sum(case when in_out = 'in' then quantity else 0 end) as inbound_qty from wms_stock_log where create_time between #{startDate} and #{endDate} group by product_id ) l on p.product_id = l.product_id left join ( select product_id, sum(quantity) as stock_qty from wms_stock group by product_id ) s on p.product_id = s.product_id group by p.product_id, p.product_code, p.product_name order by turnoverRate desc

select s.warehouse_id as warehouseId, s.location_id as locationId, p.product_id as productId, p.product_code as productCode, p.product_name as productName, s.batch_no as batchNo, ifnull(sum(s.quantity), 0) as stockQty, ifnull(sum(s.locked_quantity), 0) as lockedQty, ifnull(sum(s.available_quantity), 0) as availableQty, ifnull(sum(s.quantity * ifnull(p.cost_price, 0)), 0) as stockAmount from wms_stock s left join md_product p on s.product_id = p.product_id group by s.warehouse_id, s.location_id, p.product_id, p.product_code, p.product_name, s.batch_no order by stockAmount desc

select 'receipt' as fundType, ifnull(sum(amount), 0) as amount from fin_receipt where receipt_date between #{startDate} and #{endDate} union all select 'payment' as fundType, ifnull(sum(amount), 0) as amount from fin_payment where payment_date between #{startDate} and #{endDate} union all select 'expense' as fundType, ifnull(sum(amount), 0) as amount from fin_expense where expense_date between #{startDate} and #{endDate}
